hero.tagline: Creating Clean Air with World-Class Filtration Technology
hero.subtitle: Since 1993, Clean Tech Korea has been a trusted partner in air filtration for semiconductor, pharmaceutical, and industrial facilities worldwide.

greeting.title: CEO Greeting
greeting.content: Our Clean Tech Korea Co., Ltd. is taking a step forward for clean air and a better environment. With our creative classical spirit, automation facilities, and skilled technology, we focus on R&D in environmental fields. We promise strong global competitiveness and commitment to atmospheric environment and public health.

info.address: 675-3, Sinwol-ri, Chowol-eup, Gwangju, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea

milestones.event: Supplied Seoul National University Hospital, National Cancer Center
Transitioned to Clean Tech Korea Co., Ltd
Designated promising enterprise, Hong Kong Filtration partnership
Auto roll filters to Hyundai Electronics
HEPA/ULPA production started, supplied Samsung Electronics
Founded, began producing pre and medium filters

ulpa.name: ULPA
ulpa.description: Ultra-low penetration air filters for semiconductor cleanrooms

hepa.name: HEPA
hepa.description: High-efficiency particulate air filters for critical environments

carbon.name: CARBON
carbon.description: Activated carbon filters for gas/odor removal

footer.description: Providing world-class air filtration solutions since 1993.
